Pandowdy Apple IIe Emulator
Table of Contents

Namespace Pandowdy.EmuCore.Interfaces

Interfaces

IAppleIIBus

Apple II specific bus interface that extends the base IBus with keyboard input and pushbutton (game controller) functionality.

ICard

Represents an Apple II peripheral card that can be installed in expansion slots 1-7.

ICardFactory

Factory for creating instances of peripheral cards from registered prototypes.

ICharacterRomProvider

Provides access to the Apple IIe character ROM for text rendering.

IConfigurable

Represents an object that can persist and restore its configuration state via metadata strings.

ICpu

Represents a 6502 microprocessor and its associated registers and operations.

IDirectMemoryPoolReader

Provides direct access to the physical memory pools, bypassing the bus mapping and soft switch logic used during normal CPU access.

IDisplayBitmapRenderer

Defines a renderer capable of converting Apple IIe video memory into a displayable bitmap.

IEmulatorState

Provides access to the emulator's execution state (PC, SP, cycle count, etc.). Supports reactive subscriptions and control operations (pause, continue, step).

IFloatingBusProvider

Provides floating bus data for unmapped or undriven memory/I/O reads.

IFrameGenerator

Coordinates the generation of video frames from Apple IIe system state.

IFrameProvider

Provides access to the emulator's frame buffer for rendering with double-buffering support.

ILanguageCard
IMemoryAccessNotifier

Provides memory access notifications for debugging and monitoring purposes.

ISlots

Manages Apple IIe expansion slots and coordinates peripheral card I/O and ROM access.

ISoftSwitchResponder

Callback interface for components that need to respond to Apple II soft switch state changes.

ISystemRam
ISystemRamSelector
ISystemRomProvider
ISystemStatusProvider

Provides read-only access to the current state of Apple IIe system status and soft switches.

Enums

SlotNumber

Defines the slot numbers for Apple IIe expansion cards.

Made with docfx
